problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Polymer. Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
